rationale: Elec. Code §254.0612 governs campaign finance reporting by statewide and legislative candidates. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption and creates no conflict.
quote: Sec. 254.0612. ADDITIONAL CONTENTS OF REPORTS BY CANDIDATE FOR STATEWIDE EXECUTIVE OFFICE OR LEGISLATIVE OFFICE.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this election reporting provision.
